news.headline: GoVerden opens new HQ in Plano, Texas, and doubles staff to support rapid growth. New office located in Legacy West.
news.summary: GoVerden, a prominent avocado supplier and producer of high-quality, all-natural pre-packaged guacamole, has recently inaugurated its new headquarters in Plano, Texas. This exciting development aims to bolster the company's expansion efforts and improve its services in key markets throughout North America. Situated in the esteemed Legacy West development, the new office signifies the company's commitment to growth. With this move, GoVerden seeks to solidify its presence and better cater to the increasing demand for its products.

news.headline: Northern Trust raises $1 million for charities through charity trading day with Habitat for Humanity, Rise Against Hunger, Ronald McDonald House, and Urban Initiatives.
news.summary: Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) recently hosted its third Charity Trading Day globally, involving employees worldwide to support four selected charities. The event, held on October 16, 2024, raised a substantial amount of US$1 million in donations for Habitat for Humanity International, Rise Against Hunger, Ronald McDonald House Charities®, and Urban Initiatives. This initiative was part of Northern Trust’s philanthropic strategy as October signifies their significant month of global volunteerism.

news.headline: Square unveils new partnerships and features to strengthen beauty/wellness sellers, including distribution deal with SalonCentric and new product enhancements for increased sales and client personalization.
news.summary: Square, based in Oakland, California, has revealed new partner collaborations to provide sellers with a broader range of tools for expansion and success. The company also announced a distribution agreement with SalonCentric, expanding Square's hardware and software solutions to more beauty professionals. Furthermore, Square introduced several enhancements and features aimed at boosting sales and enhancing personalization for beauty and wellness sellers.

news.headline: Ole Miss QB Jaxson Dart partners with The Dairy Alliance to promote dairy milk in sports; targets Southeast consumers.
news.summary: In Atlanta, a non-profit organization called The Dairy Alliance, supported by dairy farm families in the Southeast, is launching its Milk's Got Game campaign during football season. The campaign aims to promote the nutritional and tasty advantages of dairy milk in sports nutrition. Quarterback Jaxson Dart from Ole Miss is joining forces with The Dairy Alliance to engage with consumers in the Southeast. This collaboration is expected to raise awareness about the benefits of dairy, with Dart being seen as a potential star in the campaign.

news.headline: 29 top brands partner with SheerID for exclusive offers on National First Responders Day, honoring heroes like firefighters and police.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, SheerID, a prominent company specializing in identity verification for commerce, along with 29 retail partners, are demonstrating appreciation for first responders by providing exclusive offers and discounts on National First Responders Day. This day, celebrated on October 28, is dedicated to honoring the efforts of firefighters, police officers, paramedics, and other emergency responders who courageously respond to crises. These brands extend hero discounts throughout the year, with this occasion serving as a unique opportunity to showcase their support.

news.headline: Report highlights 40+ startups shaping energy's future in nuclear fusion industry, exploring impact on market landscape.
news.summary: A report titled "Startup Series - Fusion Visionaries: Startups Shaping the Future of Energy" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's list of offerings. This report delves into the advancements in the nuclear fusion sector and their influence on the market. It specifically examines how startups are reshaping the nuclear fusion industry, highlighting their inventive approaches and the opportunities they present in different sectors. The report provides a comprehensive analysis of this evolving landscape.

news.headline: Dan Rabun appointed as HMH Board Chairman effective October 21, 2024. Rabun has extensive leadership experience.
news.summary: In Houston today, HMH revealed that Mr. Daniel "Dan" W. Rabun will take over as Chairman of the Board of Directors starting on October 21, 2024. With vast experience in various sectors, Mr. Rabun has served in significant positions such as CEO, Chairman, and Board member in several leading corporations. His professional journey includes pivotal roles at Ensco plc, where he began as President and Board member in 2006, eventually progressing to CEO and Chairman in 2007. After retiring from Ensco in 2014 as Chairman, Mr. Rabun has now been appointed as Chairman of the Board at HMH.

news.headline: ESS Inc. will hold Q3 2024 financial results call on Nov 13, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. EST; results for the quarter ending Sep 30, 2024.
news.summary: In Wilsonville, Oregon, ESS Tech, Inc. (NYSE:GWH), a prominent producer of long-duration energy storage systems for commercial and utility-scale use, disclosed plans for a conference call on November 13, 2024, at 5:00 p.m. EST. The call aims to review the financial performance of the third quarter of 2024, concluding on September 30, 2024. Updates on the financial outcomes for Q3 2024 will be made public post the conference call on November 13, 2024.

news.headline: Effective Fed Funds Rate 4.83% Oct. 18th vs 4.83% Oct. 17th.
Avalara announces enhanced AvaTax for Accounts Payable, further automating tax compliance for global customers.
news.summary: A leading provider of tax compliance automation software, Avalara, Inc., has announced the expansion of AvaTax capabilities on October 21, 2024. The company, based in Durham, N.C., aims to further enhance tax compliance automation for its global customers. This move is significant as it will now offer a wider range of features to assist businesses of all sizes in managing their tax obligations. AvaTax is known for its effectiveness in simplifying tax processes, and this expansion is expected to benefit a large number of customers worldwide.

news.headline: Dogecoin up 28% in a week, could hit $0.50 if Bitcoin surges; traders predict $0.50-$0.80 and $1.50-$2.00 targets for DOGE. Bitcoin may reach $80,000-$100,000; market yet to confirm breakout.
news.summary: Dogecoin (DOGE) has surged by 28% in the last week, leading traders to predict a bullish trend if Bitcoin (BTC) sees a breakout. Noted traders DonAlt and CryptoCred discussed the correlation between altcoin performance, especially Dogecoin, and Bitcoin's potential breakout in a recent podcast update. DonAlt expressed confidence in Dogecoin, aiming for prices ranging from $0.50 to $0.80 if there is a significant movement in Bitcoin, paralleling XRP's surge in 2017. Additionally, he set a target of $1.50 to $2.00 for the meme coin. Both traders foresee Bitcoin reaching $80,000 to $100,000, although a breakout has not been confirmed by market structure yet. (Character count: 639)

news.headline: Universal Robots in Denmark introduces AI Accelerator for cobots, aiming to enhance performance and AI integration in robotics.
news.summary: A company based in Odense, Denmark recently introduced an AI kit aimed at boosting performance and implementing advanced AI technologies in their robotics solutions. This move by the leader in collaborative robotics is set to significantly enhance the capabilities of their products.

news.headline: A report on Responsible AI explores AI risks management from ethical & legal perspective, covering 5 areas.
news.summary: In Dublin, a new report titled "Thematic Intelligence: Deep Dive into Responsible AI" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report delves into responsible AI, which involves managing AI-related risks ethically and legally. The document examines universal AI principles, voluntary guidelines, standards, certifications, regulations, compliance, and enforcement. This comprehensive analysis aims to provide insights into the evolving landscape of responsible AI.

news.headline: Provident Healthcare Partners helps Birmingham Heart Clinic join US Heart & Vascular in a partnership on Oct. 21, 2024.
news.summary: In an announcement dated October 21, 2024, Provident Healthcare Partners disclosed their role in advising Birmingham Heart Clinic (BHC) regarding its partnership with U.S. Heart & Vascular (USHV). BHC, known for its comprehensive healthcare services, partnered with USHV in a notable deal overseen by the respected healthcare investment banking firm.

news.headline: First United Corp. releases Q3 2024 financial results; parent company of First United Bank & Trust; under NASDAQ: FUNC.
news.summary: Oakland, Maryland, October 21, 2024 - First United Corporation (NASDAQ: FUNC), a bank holding company and the parent company of First United Bank & Trust, disclosed financial outcomes for the three- and nine-month intervals.

news.headline: Fed’s Logan: I expects money markets are close to or just above interest on reserves rate.
Fed's Logan: Over time I want negligible balances in reverse repo facility.
Fed’s Logan: The Fed could change the reverse repo rate if cash doesn’t leave the facility.
Fed’s Logan: The Fed should tolerate some money market volatility.
Fed's Logan: Selling Fed-owned mortgage bonds is not a current issue.
Fed's Logan: Liquidity is still abundant in money markets.
Fed’s Logan: I am not surprised there’s some money market volatility.
Fed’s Logan: Balance sheet cuts and rate cuts are working in same direction.
Fed's Logan: Balance sheet drawdown is part of policy normalization.
Fed’s Logan: The economy is strong and stable.
Fed's Logan: The Fed will need to be nimble with monetary policy choices.
Fed's Logan: I see downside risk to job market and ongoing risks to the inflation goal.
Fed’s Logan: I expects gradual rate cuts if the economy meets forecasts.
Apply for Community Impact Awards by Culture of Good, Inc. Open for businesses for second year. Celebrating positive impact.
news.summary: An enterprise focused on culture and leadership development, Culture of Good, Inc., based in Indianapolis, made an announcement on October 21, 2024, regarding the commencement of applications for the second edition of the Community Impact Awards. The awards aim to recognize businesses dedicated to creating a positive impact within their communities. This initiative highlights the importance of corporate social responsibility and encourages businesses to actively contribute to the betterment of society. Interested businesses can apply for the awards, with the application process currently underway. The Community Impact Awards serve as a platform to showcase and celebrate the efforts of businesses that prioritize community welfare and strive to make a difference. It exemplifies the significance of businesses engaging in philanthropic endeavors and giving back to society.

news.headline: SNDL completes privatization of Nova Cannabis Inc., appoints new director. Oct. 21, 2024. (Nasdaq: SNDL, TSX: NOVC)
news.summary: In Calgary, Alberta on October 21, 2024, SNDL Inc. (Nasdaq: SNDL) and Nova Cannabis Inc. (TSX: NOVC) confirmed the completion of their agreed plan of arrangement. SNDL has successfully purchased all outstanding shares of Nova. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for both companies.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk initiated a share repurchase programme of up to DKK 20 billion on 7 August 2024, following EU regulations.
news.summary: Bagsværd, Denmark, October 21, 2024 - Novo Nordisk began a share buyback program on August 7, 2024, in compliance with European Parliament and Council Regulation No 596/2014 (MAR) and the Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. This initiative is a component of the company's larger share repurchase plan totaling up to DKK 20 billion, set to take place over a 12-month span starting from February 6, 2024.

news.headline: 85% of online shoppers prioritize security by reviewing credit card statements for unauthorized purchases.
news.summary: In Gainesville, Florida on October 21, 2024, a recent study conducted by CardRates.com revealed that 85% of internet shoppers make it a habit to review their credit card statements for any unauthorized transactions. CardRates.com is a prominent financial platform dedicated to providing consumers with comprehensive information on credit cards. The study indicates a significant majority of online shoppers are vigilant about monitoring their financial accounts for fraudulent activities.

news.headline: Fitch Ratings: The ECB are seen cutting rates faster, not further.

Ping An Insurance reported a 5.5% rise in operating profit and 36.1% increase in net profit in 9M 2024, with RMB 861,817 million revenues. Life & Health NBV grew 34.1% to RMB 35,160 million, with 69.6% customers contributing to health and senior care services. Life & Health channel NBV also increased by 31.6% year on year.
news.summary: Ping An Insurance Group of China reported steady growth in the first nine months of 2024, achieving a 15.9% annualized operating return on equity. Operating profit and net profit attributable to shareholders rose 5.5% and 36.1%, respectively, with revenue up 8.7% to RMB861,817 million*. The three core businesses - life and health insurance, property and casualty insurance, and banking - delivered RMB119,651 million in operating profit. Life & Health saw a 34.1% increase in new business value (NBV) reaching RMB35,160 million, with health and senior care services customers contributing over 69.6% of Ping An Life's NBV. The number of individual life insurance sales agents stood at about 362,000 as of September 30, 2024, with a focus on recruiting high-quality agents. Ping An Life also saw a 68.5% increase in bancassurance channel NBV. Innovative channels accounted for 18.8% of Ping An Life's NBV in the first nine months of 2024, rising by 2.4 pps year on year.

news.headline: Verizon expected to report $1.18 EPS, revenue $33.43 billion for Q3. $1 billion deal with US Cellular. Dividend yield 6.16%.
news.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. is set to announce its third-quarter earnings on Tuesday, Oct. 22. Analysts are expecting the company, based in New York and trading on the NYSE under the symbol VZ, to report earnings of $1.18 per share for the quarter, up from $1.11 per share in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $33.43 billion, compared to $30.48 billion a year ago.Additionally, United States Cellular Corporation, listed on the NYSE as USM, has agreed to sell a portion of its retained spectrum licenses to Verizon for $1 billion. Investors interested in Verizon may also be attracted to the company's dividend opportunities, as it currently offers an annual dividend yield of 6.16%. This translates to a quarterly dividend of 67.75 cents per share, or $2.71 per year. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Mira, born in 1988 in Kazakhstan, embraced dance at five, mastered Chinese language in college.
news.summary: In a recent news report, it was revealed that Mira, a resident of Aksay, Kazakhstan, born in 1988, has showcased a lively spirit since a young age. At just five years old, she delved into the world of dance, a passion that aligned perfectly with her energetic personality. Her journey led her to master the Chinese language during her college years, showcasing her dedication and thirst for knowledge.

news.headline: Essity repurchased 270,000 Class B shares in week 42, 2024 under buyback program by Board of Directors.
news.summary: In Stockholm on October 21, 2024, Essity Aktiebolag (publ) disclosed that during the period of October 14-18, 2024, the company bought back 270,000 of its own Class B shares (ISIN: SE0009922164) in accordance with the buyback program approved by the Board of Directors. The share repurchase...

news.headline: 94% workers fear future generations lack human skills; 57% want more on-the-job observation.
news.summary: A recent survey found that 94% of workers are concerned that future generations will lack essential human skills. To address this, 57% of employees are eager for more on-the-job observation and shadowing experiences. This data underscores the importance of providing hands-on learning opportunities to bridge the skills gap.

news.headline: Nikola Corporation reveals inaugural sustainability impact report for 2023, highlighting progress in zero-emissions solutions. (Characters: 105)
news.summary: In Phoenix on October 21, 2024, Nikola Corporation (Nasdaq: NKLA), a prominent player in zero-emissions transportation and energy supply, presented its inaugural sustainability impact report through the HYLA brand. The report, detailing Nikola's sustainability efforts in 2023, showcases their commitment to environmental responsibility and green initiatives. This signifies Nikola's proactive stance in addressing global sustainability challenges.

news.headline: ProNexus Advisory & StarBridge Advisors partner to offer healthcare consulting solutions, combining expertise across domains. (Word count: 12)
news.summary: ProNexus Advisory, a healthcare consultancy based in MARBLEHEAD, Mass., announced on Oct. 21, 2024, that they are collaborating to provide comprehensive solutions for healthcare challenges. By combining knowledge in clinical, operational, and technology fields, ProNexus Advisory aims to address complex issues in the healthcare industry. This partnership leverages real-world experience to deliver integrated solutions.

news.headline: CPK offers veterans and active-duty service members a complimentary meal on Veterans Day, plus BOGO coupon; available on November 11 when dining in.
news.summary: Costa Mesa, California - California Pizza Kitchen (CPK) is showing appreciation to U.S. veterans and active-duty service members on Veterans Day by offering them a free entrée and drink from a special menu on Monday, November 11 for dine-in only. Along with this offer, veterans and active-duty service members dining at CPK on Veterans Day will also receive a Buy One Get One coupon as a token of gratitude. This promotion is exclusive to November 11 and aims to recognize the service and sacrifice of military personnel.

news.headline: Stereotaxis to showcase technology at Society for Cardiac Robotic Navigation Annual Meeting in Lisbon on Oct 28-29.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Stereotaxis, a prominent player in surgical robotics for minimally invasive endovascular intervention, disclosed its involvement in the Society for Cardiac Robotic Navigation’s Annual Meeting on October 28-29 in Lisbon, Portugal. Stereotaxis, listed on NYSE as STXS, stands as a pioneer and global frontrunner in this field, showcasing its advancements at the upcoming event.

news.headline: Once Upon A Coconut now available at 420 Sprouts Farmers Market locations in the US as per Oct 21, 2024.
news.summary: In Orlando, Florida on October 21, 2024, Once Upon A Coconut, a renowned brand of premium coconut water, has started selling its refreshing drinks in over 420 Sprouts Farmers Market stores nationwide. This successful launch comes after the brand's initial introduction at...

news.headline: Anello Photonics awarded contract for Phase I SBIR Topic SF241-0019 Resonator Laser Gyro by Space Force.
news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, on October 21, 2024, Anello Photonics reveals their selection by SpaceWERX for a SBIR Phase I project concentrating on Resonator Laser Gyroscope technology. This initiative aims to tackle critical issues within the Department of the Air Force (DAF). The collaboration involves the Air Force Research Laboratory and marks a significant milestone for Anello Photonics in their pursuit to address challenges faced by the DAF.

news.headline: Guide on selecting the right coffee grinder for optimal flavor based on brewing methods; importance of grinding beans before brewing, benefits of differing grinds for flavor. (Word count: 26)
news.summary: A recent report from Montvale, New Jersey on October 21, 2024 highlighted the importance of grinding coffee beans just before brewing for true coffee lovers. The report emphasized that each brewing technique requires a particular grind size to enhance the flavor of the coffee. Therefore, selecting the right coffee grinder is crucial for enhancing the coffee experience.

news.headline: AITX's RAD-M achieves full autonomy with ROAMEO™ Gen4, a significant milestone in navigation technology.
news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that a total of 300 people are facing possible job cuts within the next month. This decision comes as a result of the company restructuring to offset a revenue loss of $2 million in the latest fiscal quarter. The affected employees will receive a severance package equivalent to two months of salary, along with job placement assistance. The company is also offering retraining programs to help the employees transition into new roles. This move has sparked controversy and criticism from labor unions, who are calling for better employee protection and involvement in decision-making processes. The company spokesperson stated that the restructuring is necessary for the long-term sustainability of the business in a competitive market. The situation is still developing, and further updates are expected in the coming weeks.

news.headline: WITHit launches Deca & Giga smartwatches, combining health tracking & modern design. Effortless everyday connectivity.
news.summary: WITHit, a pioneering wearable tech accessories company, has recently unveiled their latest smartwatches - the Deca and Giga models. These watches offer a seamless blend of advanced health tracking, personalized features, and sleek modern design to enhance everyday connectivity. The Deca and Giga smartwatches are set to revolutionize the market with their cutting-edge technology. The launch took place in New York on October 21, 2024. Consumers can discover more about these innovative devices by visiting WITHit's website at www.withitgear.com.

news.headline: HT Materials Science chosen by Amazon for energy-efficient nanofluid pilot in select UK fulfillment centers.
news.summary: Dublin-based company HT Materials Science (HTMS), known for its environmentally friendly solutions, has been chosen as part of a group of eleven startups in the sustainability sector to conduct trials with Amazon throughout Europe. This opportunity follows their recent selection and underscores their commitment to energy efficiency.

news.headline: Helios obtains ISO-27001:2022 certification and SOC 2 Type 1 compliance, serving clients in 125+ countries.
news.summary: Helios, a leading workforce management provider serving organizations in over 125 countries, demonstrates its dedication to data security and compliance with the recent attainment of ISO 27001:2022 certification for information security. Established in Chicago on Oct. 21, 2024, Helios solidifies its commitment to safeguarding data, highlighting its global presence and industry leadership.

news.headline: Yahara Software wins Best Place to Work by Madison Magazine for 2024, recognized for people-first culture.
news.summary: In Madison, Wisconsin on October 21, 2024, Yahara Software, a prominent custom software development company, was honored with the Best Place to Work award by Madison Magazine for the year 2024. This esteemed accolade highlights the company's emphasis on a culture that prioritizes its employees and its commitment to promoting employee well-being.
